description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of pasta branded as BENEA, featuring a bold red and blue color scheme with a prominent '100% Natural' label on the front. The front face displays the product name 'Penne Rigate', a stylized image of a penne pasta piece, and key product details such as gluten-free, quick cooking time, and serving size. The left side of the box provides a list of ingredients, nutritional information, and a note that it contains no wheat derivatives. The right side features a company description and contact information, while the back is mostly plain with the same red and blue design motif. The box appears sealed and is designed for retail display, with all surfaces smooth and printed.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of BENEA Penne Rigate pasta, featuring a red and blue design with product and nutritional information printed on its surfaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the BENEA brand, '100% Natural' label, penne pasta illustration, and key product details in white text on a red and blue background.
description_view_1: The left side displays the ingredients, nutritional facts, and a note about the absence of wheat derivatives, all in white text on a red and blue background.
description_view_2: The back is mostly plain, with a red and blue color gradient and minimal design elements, lacking any text or branding.
description_view_3: The right side features the BENEA brand, a company description, and contact information, all in white text on a blue background with a touch of red at the bottom.
attribute_labeling: Front: '100% Natural', 'BENEA', 'Pasta seca', 'Libre de gluten', 'Lista en 8 minutos', 'Rinde 5 porciones', 'Peso Neto 500g', 'Penne Rigate'; Left: ingredients, nutritional information, wheat-free note; Right: company description, contact info.
attribute_placement: standing upright on a flat surface
